items.name_en: LOOP HOBO Runway Edition #M46311# Inspection-free Version
items.name_cn:
LOOP HOBO Runway Edition #M46311# Inspection-free Version
▪️Size: 38*26*10cm▪️
The runway Loop Hobo is simply full of fashion sense,
With a crescent moon shape, it was loved at first sight on the runway.
The bag shape is lazy yet stylish, sweet and salty,
Monogram color blocking, classic yet eye-catching. With two shoulder straps,
The metal chain can be used as a retro clutch, and the leather strap can be crossbody or shoulder, offering multiple ways to style.
Great capacity, with a mother-and-child bag design, making it both stylish and practical. The winner of both looks and functionality!

items.name_en: LOUISE Small Smooth Calfskin Handbag 24s New Louise Bucket Bag
items.name_cn:
LOUISE Small Smooth Calfskin Handbag 24s New Louise Bucket Bag
Calling all the besties who previously planted a seed for the 16 bucket bag📣
This year's Louise lock adds an Arc de Triomphe element
Enhances the recognition of this bucket bag, making it more fashionable and exquisite
Meets hand-carry/crossbody/shoulder needs with a very considerable capacity
Completely stress-free for daily commute/business trips/office 👏
Besties who like it can buy with confidence~
Leather flap with TRIOMPHE magnetic snap
1 main compartment
1 leather top handle, 3 inches (7 cm) long
Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, min length 19 inches (48 cm), max length 21 inches (53.5 cm)
Dimensions 6 X 7 X 5 inches (16 X 19 X 12 cm)
Item No.: 119173

items.name_cn:
Loulou 32cm·Black with Black Buckle
Y's classic bestseller! The most practical and versatile, crafted from premium Italian cowhide with an amazing texture! The bag is incredibly lightweight with no burden, and countless celebrities, influencers, and bloggers own one. It looks stylish and elegant on the body! Versatile carrying styles: shoulder, crossbody, or handheld. Unlock various daily looks!
Size: 32×22×11cm
Model: 487216

items.name_cn:
Loє🌟wє Puzzle 660
Brown mixed with brown-yellow small size~
🧱Synchronized with the latest cabinet style
❤️Synchronized with the latest version from the counter, size 24-14-11CM, large capacity, perfect for daily wear and trips!
❤️A color you won't regret buying. 2019 synchronized with the latest counter style. No interface, full leather lining, thin shoulder strap, no studs at the bottom. Made of imported Spanish calfskin 🐄, soft and comfortable to the touch. Precise cutting allows it to fold naturally, can be carried by hand or slung over the shoulder (multiple uses). Removable long shoulder strap, textile lining. Practical, feels great to use! ❤️💋👩👩❤️💋👩👩❤️💋👩
❤️High-end exclusive private custom hardware, calfskin, German imported Saffiano thread, imported YKK zippers, ZP craftsmanship

items.name_cn:
Lucky Bag Woven Bag 🏖️
Best-seller alert! Jamie's Lucky Bag is updated with raffia material. This bag is chillier than the lambskin, full of vacation vibes. Incredible capacity! Fits sunscreen, sunglasses, and straw hats. Unique woven texture, recording the warmth of the sun. Every photo radiates leisure and comfort!
Model No.: 833948
Size: 27×29×11cm
